title: tragacantha lactea
intro: Tragacantha lactea, also known as the milk thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the aster family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which contain silymarin, a complex mixture of flavonoids that have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha lactea include protecting the liver from damage, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, can be used to support liver health and promote overall well-being.
